description_long: This object depicts a highly distorted adult pedestrian figure, with exaggeratedly elongated arms extending upward and outward, merging into a V-shape. The head and facial features are human-like, with a neutral expression, and the body is dressed in a form-fitting suit with visible seams and details. The legs are bent at the knees, giving the impression of a crouched or crawling posture, and the feet are clad in athletic-style shoes. The arms are unnaturally stretched, creating a surreal and almost abstract appearance, while the torso and lower body retain more realistic human proportions. The surface of the object is smooth, with a mix of matte and slightly glossy finishes, and the overall form is continuous without any visible separations or joints. The figure appears to be made primarily of a synthetic material, possibly plastic or resin, with painted details to simulate clothing and facial features.
description: A surreal, elongated adult pedestrian figure in a crouched pose with extremely stretched arms and a smooth, synthetic surface. The figure wears a form-fitting suit and athletic shoes, with realistic facial features.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face, chest, and both arms stretched upward in a V-shape, with bent legs and feet visible below.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the extreme length of the arms and the profile of the head, with the body and legs in a crouched position.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the V-shaped arms extending outward, and the backs of the bent legs and feet.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the elongated arm, side profile of the head, and the crouched lower body.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic bodysuit with fitted sleeves and pants
attribute_posture: crouching with arms extended upward and outward
